name: Unnamed Patient
history: Longstanding friendship with Ethan since high school (about 14 years). Shared personal crises and professional collaborations. Learned that Ethan has been abusive toward his girlfriend.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be abandoned
intermediate_belief: I must maintain relationships even if they are harmful.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not worthy of love if I am not needed.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of confrontation and maintaining distance to prevent conflict.
auto_thought: If I confront Ethan, I will lose the friendship.
